name: claude-agent-rail
title: Claude Agent Context Rail
description: High — poured verbatim from the pass-100 claude-desktop cowork rail (itself built from public layout description; no live cowork-rail capture exists yet), light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable Claude task/status sidecar for demos that need progress, context, artifacts, connectors, or working-file state without the full Claude app shell.
